query: Get comprehensive company profile data for the company named "DoiT International". The company's official website domain is doit.com — use this for disambiguation and to ensure you are searching for the correct company. Gather information from LinkedIn, G2, Reddit, and other reliable sources. Include company details, reviews, industry codes (UNSPSC, NAICS, ISIC), and market sentiment.
answer:
## Executive Summary
DoiT International is a cloud cost optimization and FinOps company founded in 2011 that manages over $2 billion in cloud spend for more than 3,000 customers. The company offers its proprietary DoiT Cloud Intelligence platform alongside expert consultancy, maintaining strong strategic partnerships with major cloud providers like AWS, Google Cloud, and Microsoft Azure. While customer and employee sentiment is generally highly positive, recent internal reviews suggest emerging friction regarding leadership and technical support consistency.

## Company Overview & Financials
**Foundational Details**
*   **Headquarters:** 3979 Freedom Circle, Suite 200, Santa Clara, CA, USA [Where is DoiT Located? HQ, Global Offices & Company Insights](https://www.highperformr.ai/company/doitintl).
*   **Global Presence:** The company operates 14 global locations, with notable offices in Tel Aviv (Israel), London (United Kingdom), and Austin (Texas, USA) [Where is DoiT Located? HQ, Global Offices & Company Insights](https://www.highperformr.ai/company/doitintl); [DoiT - Overview, News & Similar companies | ZoomInfo.com](https://www.zoominfo.com/c/doit-international/358508467).
*   **Headcount:** DoiT employs 646 people, with estimates placing the total workforce between 500 and 1,000 employees [Where is DoiT Located? HQ, Global Offices & Company Insights](https://www.highperformr.ai/company/doitintl); [DoiT - Overview, News & Similar companies | ZoomInfo.com](https://www.zoominfo.com/c/doit-international/358508467).
*   **Funding:** The company has raised a total of $267 million, which includes a $100 million Series A round secured on October 31, 2019 [DoiT 2026 Company Profile: Valuation, Funding & Investors | PitchBook](https://pitchbook.com/profiles/company/129122-83).
*   **M&A Activity:** DoiT International previously acquired superQuery, a move that was received positively in the r/bigquery Reddit community [r/bigquery - DoiT International announces acquisition of superQuery](https://www.reddit.com/r/bigquery/comments/eyfddk/doit_international_announces_acquisition_of/).

**Executive Leadership**
*   **CEO:** Yoav Toussia-Cohen [Where is DoiT Located? HQ, Global Offices & Company Insights](https://www.highperformr.ai/company/doitintl)
*   **GM & CTO:** Vadim Solovey [Where is DoiT Located? HQ, Global Offices & Company Insights](https://www.highperformr.ai/company/doitintl)
*   **CFO:** Samit Arora (appointed January 2024) [Where is DoiT Located? HQ, Global Offices & Company Insights](https://www.highperformr.ai/company/doitintl)
*   **CRO:** Scott White [Where is DoiT Located? HQ, Global Offices & Company Insights](https://www.highperformr.ai/company/doitintl)
*   **COO:** Steve Mills (promoted from CRO after serving in the role for just under a year) [DoiT - Overview, News & Similar companies | ZoomInfo.com](https://www.zoominfo.com/c/doit-international/358508467)
*   **Chief People Officer:** Kristen Tronsky [Where is DoiT Located? HQ, Global Offices & Company Insights](https://www.highperformr.ai/company/doitintl)

## Core Offerings & Market Position
DoiT International provides services spanning cloud architecture, migration, cost optimization, security, training, data analytics, and machine learning [Doit International Ltd - Company Profile and News - Bloomberg Markets](https://www.bloomberg.com/profile/company/2480907D:IT). 

**DoiT Cloud Intelligence Platform**
The company's flagship product is an intent-aware FinOps solution designed to optimize cloud costs, reliability, performance, and security [DoiT - Crunchbase Company Profile & Funding](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/doit-international). 
*   **Pricing:** The platform utilizes a usage-based pricing model determined by the volume of cloud resources managed [DoiT Cloud Intelligence Reviews & Ratings 2026 | Gartner Peer Insights](https://www.gartner.com/reviews/product/doit-cloud-intelligence).
*   **Key Features:** DoiT offers a machine learning-based tool called Flexsave to manage cloud costs [DoiT International Widens Access to Flexsave, a ML- ...](https://www.reddit.com/r/NewsfeedForWork/comments/vxoico/doit_international_widens_access_to_flexsave_a/). One customer reported that Flexsave increased their commitment coverage from 40% to 70% and generated approximately 15% in additional compute savings [AWS Marketplace: DoiT Cloud Intelligence Reviews](https://aws.amazon.com/marketplace/reviews/reviews-list/prodview-hfyauj43hrpe2).
*   **Ecosystem Tools:** DoiT provides a BigQuery Slot Autoscaling pricing calculator and a tool to compare Google Cloud instance types across 20 parameters, including CPU performance and network scores [overview for sayle_doit](https://www.reddit.com/user/sayle_doit/); [DoiT International (u/doitintl) - Reddit](https://www.reddit.com/user/doitintl/).
*   **Partnerships:** DoiT is an 8-time Google Cloud Partner of the Year, winning the Global Sales Partner of the Year Award for two consecutive years [DoiT International Jobs in Berlin | Glassdoor](https://www.glassdoor.com/Jobs/DoiT-International-Berlin-Jobs-EI_IE1972488.0,18_IL.19,25_IC2622109.htm).

## Industry Classification Codes
Business directories classify DoiT International under the following codes [DoiT International Information](https://rocketreach.co/doit-international-profile_b5d0c7d4f42e41c9):
*   **NAICS:** 541512, 54151, 5415, 541, 54
*   **SIC:** 737, 73

## Customer Sentiment & Product Reviews
DoiT maintains a strong market reputation, boasting a 98.5% average customer satisfaction score according to company press releases [DoiT Introduces DoiT Cloud Intelligence™ to Cut Through the Illusion of Efficiency in the Public Cloud](https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20241203728261/en/DoiT-Introduces-DoiT-Cloud-Intelligence-to-Cut-Through-the-Illusion-of-Efficiency-in-the-Public-Cloud). The platform is backed by a 30-day satisfaction guarantee [AWS Marketplace: DoiT Cloud Intelligence - Amazon.com](https://aws.amazon.com/marketplace/pp/prodview-hfyauj43hrpe2).

**Positive Feedback**
*   **Ratings:** The company holds a 4.4-star rating across 79 verified G2 reviews and is featured in 20 in-depth reviews on Gartner Peer Insights [DoiT Products | Read 79 Reviews on G2](https://www.g2.com/sellers/doit-84d96d0d-c750-46ed-8237-80c355abe4f0); [DoiT Cloud Intelligence Reviews & Ratings 2026 | Gartner Peer Insights](https://www.gartner.com/reviews/product/doit-cloud-intelligence). G2 has recognized DoiT as a "Leader" in several recent reports [Cloud Intelligence™ Resources](https://www.doit.com/resources).
*   **Ease of Use:** Users report the platform integrates easily via "a few copy/pasted commands" and by adding read-only permissions to cloud projects [DoiT Cloud Intelligence Reviews 2026: Details, Pricing, & Features | G2](https://www.g2.com/products/doit-cloud-intelligence/reviews); [AWS Marketplace: DoiT Cloud Intelligence Reviews - Amazon.com](https://aws.amazon.com/marketplace/reviews/reviews-list/prodview-hfyauj43hrpe2?page=2).
*   **Value Drivers:** Customers highlight "cost anomalies alerts" as a "game-changer" for proactive notifications on spending spikes [AWS Marketplace: DoiT Cloud Intelligence Reviews](https://aws.amazon.com/marketplace/reviews/reviews-list/prodview-hfyauj43hrpe2). Reviewers also note that the "real benefit" lies in DoiT's proactive account management and technical consultancy [DoiT Cloud Intelligence Reviews 2026: Details, Pricing, & Features | G2](https://www.g2.com/products/doit-cloud-intelligence/reviews).

**Criticisms & Limitations**
*   **Technical Support:** Support quality can be inconsistent, with one user noting, "sometimes in Technical support, you can get someone who doesn't know much" [DoiT Reviews, Cost & Features | GetApp Australia 2026](https://www.getapp.com.au/software/2062806/doit).
*   **Reporting & Billing:** Users have expressed a desire for "more flexibility in attributing GKE costs in reporting tools" and frustration over an inability to "consolidate all products into a single bill" [DoiT Reviews 2026. Verified Reviews, Pros & Cons | Capterra](https://www.capterra.com/p/264871/DoiT/reviews/); [DoiT Reviews, Cost & Features | GetApp Australia 2026](https://www.getapp.com.au/software/2062806/doit).
*   **Integrations:** There is contradictory feedback regarding Slack integration; one reviewer claimed they "can't integrate to slack," while another reported having a "slack channel integrated" for daily reports [DoiT Reviews, Cost & Features | GetApp Australia 2026](https://www.getapp.com.au/software/2062806/doit).

## Employee Sentiment & Internal Culture
DoiT International operates with a "Remote First" policy to support work-life balance [DoiT International: Employee Benefits and Perks](https://www.glassdoor.com/Benefits/DoiT-International-US-Benefits-EI_IE1972488.0,18_IL.19,21_IN1.htm). The company holds a 4.1 out of 5 overall rating on Glassdoor based on over 338 reviews, with CEO Yoav Toussia-Cohen maintaining a 96% approval rating [DoiT "company culture" Reviews | Glassdoor](https://www.glassdoor.com/Reviews/DoiT-company-culture-Reviews-EI_IE1972488.0,4_KH5,20.htm); [DoiT International Senior Leadership Questions | Glassdoor](https://www.glassdoor.com/FAQ/DoiT-International-Senior-Leadership-Questions-EI_IE1972488.0,18_KC19,36.htm).

**Compensation & Hiring**
*   US employees rate compensation and benefits at 4.3 out of 5 stars [DoiT International Salaries](https://www.glassdoor.com/Salary/DoiT-International-Salaries-E1972488.htm).
*   Average annual salaries in the US are approximately $120,381 for a Business Development Representative (BDR) and $176,413 for an Account Executive [DoiT International Salaries](https://www.glassdoor.com/Salary/DoiT-International-Salaries-E1972488.htm).
*   The interview process is highly regarded, described across 219 Glassdoor entries as "super clear, well-organized, and enjoyable" [DoiT Interview Experience & Questions (2026) | Glassdoor](https://www.glassdoor.com/Interview/DoiT-Interview-Questions-E1972488.htm).

**Internal Friction**
Despite high overall ratings, there are signs of internal dissent. A 1.0-star Glassdoor review from October 2025 titled "The downfall is real" alleged that leadership failures, finger-pointing, and scapegoating have led to the loss of core talent [DoiT - The downfall is real | Glassdoor](https://www.glassdoor.com/Reviews/Employee-Review-DoiT-E1972488-RVW100459848.htm). Furthermore, an anonymous employee claimed that positive Glassdoor reviews are "heavily pushed by People Ops during onboarding for optics" [DoiT - The downfall is real | Glassdoor](https://www.glassdoor.com/Reviews/Employee-Review-DoiT-E1972488-RVW100459848.htm). In contrast, DoiT management has explicitly stated they ask employees for honest reviews without pressure for specific ratings or "sugar-coating" [DoiT "everyone" Reviews | Glassdoor](https://www.glassdoor.com/Reviews/DoiT-everyone-Reviews-EI_IE1972488.0,4_KH5,13.htm).

## Gaps and Limitations
*   **Industry Codes:** While NAICS and SIC codes were successfully identified, the requested UNSPSC and ISIC codes were not present in the provided research findings.
*   **Financial Data:** Beyond the total funding amount and Series A details, specific revenue figures, profitability metrics, and post-2019 funding round details were not available in the provided sources.
